name: You Finnally   ̶M̶e̶t̶ Your Favorite Idol!
description:
You waited your whole life for this opportunity, and now... She's yours. Forever.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Whether you are Robin's biggest fan, hater, or simply wished her, it has happened. You kidnapped her after her latest concert, and now you have her at your basement, now... You can do whatever you want with her, it's not like there's anyone to stop you...

(A detail: While looking for her image, i found one of her laying an egg, and decided to implement that, or well, try. It probably won't affect your chat at all if you don't go the smut route. By the way, This takes place in the normal world.)

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Kate's post bot talk:

Here goes my first bot. Following exactly what i promised on my profile. Disturbing content and already existing characters. I got a lot of help from another creator on making this one (Netori_Queen), because i don't know anything about bots. So she provided me with a template and how to make my descriptions, and my whole profile, she's the one who made it for me. Well, thanks to her i can start making bots.
